endpoints.name:
It will validate followings
1. Vault capacity
2. VM is already protected
3. Any VM related configuration passed in properties.
endpoints.description:
It will validate followings
1. Vault capacity
2. VM is already protected
3. Any VM related configuration passed in properties.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AZUREREGION}} with a real azureregion.

endpoints.name: Get the container backup status
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AZUREREGION}} with a real azureregion.

endpoints.name: It will validate if given feature with resource properties is supported in service
endpoints.description: It will validate if given feature with resource properties is supported in service
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AZUREREGION}} with a real azureregion.

endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupFabrics/{fabricName}/backupProtectionIntent/{intentObjectName}
endpoints.description:
Provides the details of the protection intent up item. This is an asynchronous operation. To know the status of the operation,
call the GetItemOperationResult API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FABRICNAME}} with a real fabricname. Replace {{INTENTOBJECTNAME}} with a real intentobjectname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: PUT /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupFabrics/{fabricName}/backupProtectionIntent/{intentObjectName}
endpoints.description: Create Intent for Enabling backup of an item. This is a synchronous operation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FABRICNAME}} with a real fabricname. Replace {{INTENTOBJECTNAME}} with a real intentobjectname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupFabrics/{fabricName}/backupProtectionIntent/{intentObjectName}
endpoints.description: Used to remove intent from an item
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FABRICNAME}} with a real fabricname. Replace {{INTENTOBJECTNAME}} with a real intentobjectname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupProtectionIntents
endpoints.description: Provides a pageable list of all intents that are present within a vault.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupUsageSummaries
endpoints.description: Fetches the backup management usage summaries of the vault.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.
